result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 33:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c,
    ch.newvalue__c,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS first_ownerid
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
),
last_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS last_ownerid
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = cnt
),
case_transferred AS (
  SELECT case_id, (cnt > 1) AS is_transferred
  FROM case_assignments
  GROUP BY case_id, cnt
),
recent_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
counts_by_agent AS (
  SELECT agent_id, count(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_count
  FROM (
    SELECT rc.case_id, fo.first_ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM recent_cases rc
    JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = rc.case_id
    UNION ALL
    SELECT rc.case_id, lo.last_ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM recent_cases rc
    JOIN last_owner lo ON lo.case_id = rc.case_id
  ) s
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
handle_times AS (
  SELECT fo.first_ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rc.closeddate - rc.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM recent_cases rc
  JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = rc.case_id
  LEFT JOIN case_transferred ct ON ct.case_id = rc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ct.is_transferred, FALSE) = FALSE
)
SELECT ht.agent_id AS id
FROM handle_times ht
JOIN counts_by_agent cba ON cba.agent_id = ht.agent_id
WHERE cba.cases_count > 1
GROUP BY ht.agent_id
ORDER BY avg(ht.handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c,
    ch.newvalue__c,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS first_ownerid
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
),
last_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS last_ownerid
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = cnt
),
case_transferred AS (
  SELECT case_id, (cnt > 1) AS is_transferred
  FROM case_assignments
  GROUP BY case_id, cnt
),
recent_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
counts_by_agent AS (
  SELECT agent_id, count(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_count
  FROM (
    SELECT rc.case_id, fo.first_ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM recent_cases rc
    JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = rc.case_id
    UNION ALL
    SELECT rc.case_id, lo.last_ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM recent_cases rc
    JOIN last_owner lo ON lo.case_id = rc.case_id
  ) s
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
handle_times AS (
  SELECT fo.first_ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rc.closeddate - rc.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM recent_cases rc
  JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = rc.case_id
  LEFT JOIN case_transferred ct ON ct.case_id = rc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ct.is_transferred, FALSE) = FALSE
)
SELECT ht.agent_id AS id
FROM handle_times ht
JOIN counts_by_agent cba ON cba.agent_id = ht.agent_id
WHERE cba.cases_count > 1
GROUP BY ht.agent_id
ORDER BY avg(ht.handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;

recent_cases AS (

    UNION ALL

LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.newvalue__c,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS first_ownerid
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
),
last_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS last_ownerid
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = cnt
),
case_transferred AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT case_id, (cnt > 1) AS is_transferred
  FROM case_assignments
),
recent_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
counts_by_agent AS (
  SELECT agent_id, count(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_count
  FROM (
    SELECT rc.case_id, fo.first_ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM recent_cases rc
    JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = rc.case_id
    UNION ALL
    SELECT rc.case_id, lo.last_ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM recent_cases rc
    JOIN last_owner lo ON lo.case_id = rc.case_id
  ) s
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
handle_times AS (
  SELECT fo.first_ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rc.closed_ts - rc.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM recent_cases rc
  JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = rc.case_id
  LEFT JOIN case_transferred ct ON ct.case_id = rc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ct.is_transferred, FALSE) = FALSE
)
SELECT ht.agent_id AS id,
       count(*) AS non_transferred_closed_cases,
       avg(ht.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
       max(cba.cases_count) AS total_cases_in_filter
FROM handle_times ht
JOIN counts_by_agent cba ON cba.agent_id = ht.agent_id
WHERE cba.cases_count > 1
GROUP BY ht.agent_id
ORDER BY avg(ht.handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 20;

FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months');

exec_args.sql:
SELECT count(*) AS closed_cases_recent
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months');

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.newvalue__c,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
)
SELECT
  sum(CASE WHEN cnt=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cases_cnt_1,
  sum(CASE WHEN cnt>1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cases_cnt_gt1,
  count(DISTINCT case_id) AS total_with_owner_hist
FROM case_assignments;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.newvalue__c,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
)
SELECT
  sum(CASE WHEN cnt=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cases_cnt_1,
  sum(CASE WHEN cnt>1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cases_cnt_gt1,
  count(DISTINCT case_id) AS total_with_owner_hist
FROM case_assignments;

args.query:
SELECT field__c, count(*) AS n
FROM casehistory__c
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY n DESC
LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c,
    ch.newvalue__c,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS first_ownerid
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
),
last_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS last_ownerid
